defect_observation: The recommendation selected North at $120,000 even though the evidence showed that South also met all required controls and cost $95,000.
diagnosis: The selected vendor was not the lowest-cost vendor among the qualifying options.
revision_delta: Changed the recommendation from North at $120,000 to South at $95,000 and updated the supporting sentence while preserving both vendor rows.
criterion_local_recheck: Pass: South meets all required controls and, at $95,000 annually, costs less than qualifying vendor North at $120,000.
collateral_recheck: Pass: The recommendation and evidence summary consistently identify South and $95,000, and both North and South rows remain in the evidence table.
new_error_assessment: No new error identified; all statements remain within the supplied vendor evidence and claim boundary.
